content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Golf Carts of ATX: Inbound/Outbound Sales - Remote - English language - No accent preferred Anywhere in the World Texas Sales and English Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5646/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Austin, TX <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://golfcartsofatx.com">https://golfcartsofatx.com</a> </p> <p>We're hiring another sales rep to communicate with our customers via phone calls, text messages, emails, and meta comments.<br><br>In addition to inbound calls, you will be expected to outbound call our list of warm+hot leads. We receive over 100 quote requests from our website each day, so you'll be responsible for calling them, answering their questions and concerns, and guiding them through the sales process.<br><br><strong>Must speak clear and perfect English.&nbsp; No Heavy Accents will be considered.</strong><br><br>40 hours per week, bi-weekly pay<br>Paid Training<br>Salary Range is $1500-3000 per month, plus optional OT and commissions.<br><br>Please send me your resume, salary requirements and a link to a short audio sample of you speaking English.<br><br><a href="mailto:admin@golfcartsofatx.com">admin@golfcartsofatx.com</a><br><br>Do not send your resume to any other email or call the office, or you will be blocked.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/golf-carts-of-atx-inbound-outbound-sales-remote-english-language-no-accent-preferred">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/golf-carts-of-atx-inbound-outbound-sales-remote-english-language-no-accent-preferred</a></p> Tue, 23 Jun 2026 22:47:17 +0000 Thu, 23 Jul 2026 22:47:17 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/golf-carts-of-atx-inbound-outbound-sales-remote-english-language-no-accent-preferred https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/golf-carts-of-atx-inbound-outbound-sales-remote-english-language-no-accent-preferred The Podcast Consultant: The Podcast Consultant | Account Manager (Full-Time Contract) Anywhere in the World Illinois Client Relationship Management, Client Retention Strategies, and Business Analysis & Strategy Customer Support Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5645/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://thepodcastconsultant.com/">https://thepodcastconsultant.com/</a> </p> <p>The Podcast Consultant (TPC) is a premium podcast production agency helping high-performing clients launch and grow world-class shows. We're growing fast, our model is evolving, and we're building the systems and team to match.</p> <p>The Account Manager is the single point of contact for their assigned clients at TPC. You own the relationship. That means managing communication, driving strategy conversations, keeping production on track, and making sure every client feels like they have a trusted partner in their corner.</p> <p>This is a relationship ownership role inside a company that's still building the playbook. This means you'll need to be someone who can execute with precision in one moment and navigate ambiguity in the next. If you thrive when the answer isn't always written down yet, this is the right seat.</p> <p>To apply, please fill out the form below <strong>by Friday July 3rd at 11:59pm ET. </strong>We will be in touch if we think it's a good fit.</p> <p><strong>Role Type</strong>: Full-Time, Contract</p> <p><strong>Location</strong>: Remote with fluency in English and ability to work in a U.S. timezone</p> <p><strong>Reports to</strong>: Director of Operations</p> <p><strong>Salary:</strong> $50,000-60,000</p> <p>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</p> <p><strong>What You'll Own</strong></p> <p><strong>Client Relationships</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>You are the primary point of contact for your assigned clients.</p> </li> <li> <p>You onboard new clients, set expectations, run monthly strategy calls, and maintain communication every week an episode goes live.</p> </li> <li> <p>You make clients feel like partners, not just customers getting a service.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Production Liaison</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>You sit between clients and the production team, translating concerns in both directions.</p> </li> <li> <p>When clients have production issues, you route them to the production team and maintain communication with the client.</p> </li> <li> <p>When production flags a submission error, you reach the client with specific, actionable guidance.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Account Health Monitoring</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>You track and flag at-risk situations before they become churn, whether it's missed episodes, late payments, complaints, or just a gut feeling that something's off.</p> </li> <li> <p>You submit a weekly KPI report to leadership covering active clients, at-risk accounts, touchpoint recency, and monthly call completion.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Documentation</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Every touchpoint, concern, call, and incident is documented.</p> </li> <li> <p>You keep every client record current, updating lifecycle status, follow-up dates, production flags, meeting notes, and anything else that matters.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>What Success Looks Like</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Every assigned client has been touched within the last 15 days.</p> </li> <li> <p>Monthly strategy calls happen every month.</p> </li> <li> <p>Production errors are caught, communicated, and resolved.</p> </li> <li> <p>At-risk situations are identified and escalated before leadership has to ask about them.</p> </li> <li> <p>The CRM is a living, accurate record.</p> </li> <li> <p>Clients know your name, trust your judgment, and feel well-served.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>What We're Looking For</strong></p> <p><strong>Non-Negotiables</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>2+ years in account management, client success, business development, or a client-facing role.</p> </li> <li> <p>Exceptional written and verbal communication. You write clearly, you follow up, and you don't let things fall through the cracks.</p> </li> <li> <p>Highly organized and self-directed. You manage your own calendar, your own follow-ups, and your own accountability without being managed.</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable with ambiguity. You'll be handed a playbook, but you'll also help refine it.</p> </li> </ul> <p&g
